auth.name: Name
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
auth.confirmPasswordDescription: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
auth.verificationLinkSent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
auth.requestAccessDescription: Enter your email address to request access. An administrator will review your request and you'll receive an email with instructions to set up your password.
auth.registrationSubmitted: Your registration request has been submitted. You will receive an email once an administrator has approved your request.
auth.setupPasswordDescription: Set a password for your account ({{email}}) to complete your registration.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Training Session Planner
dashboard.exerciseLibraryDescription: Create and manage your training exercises with details like duration, materials, and target age groups
dashboard.trainingSessionsDescription: Build training sessions by combining exercises from your library
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the Valley Bucketeers Training Planner! Here's how to get started:
dashboard.step1: Create exercises with details like duration, materials, and YouTube videos
dashboard.step2: Build training sessions by selecting exercises from your library
dashboard.step3: Reorder exercises and adjust durations within each session
dashboard.step4: Print or export your session plan for use at training

exercises.title: Exercise Library
exercises.addFirstDrill: Add your first drill to get started
exercises.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this drill?

framework.title: Technical Framework
framework.noExercises: No framework exercises for this age group.
framework.bookmarkHelp: Set the page number where each age group section starts in the PDF.

profile.title: Profile
profile.profileInformationDescription: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.resendVerification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verificationLinkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.updatePasswordDescription: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.deleteAccountDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

sessions.title: Training Sessions
sessions.noSessionsDescription: Create your first training session to get started
sessions.overTimeWarning: This session exceeds the target duration
sessions.dragExercises: Drag exercises from the library to add them to the session
sessions.noExercisesInSessionDescription: Drag exercises from the library on the right
sessions.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this training session?
sessions.sessionFull: Session is over the target duration
sessions.selectExerciseDescription: Click on an exercise in the session to view its details

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noSessionsAvailable: No sessions available. Create one first.
calendar.alreadyAssigned: A session is already assigned to this date
calendar.dragOrClick: Drag a session onto a day or click an empty slot

plays.title: Play Designer
plays.noPlaysDescription: Create your first play to get started
plays.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this play?
